chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 6612 of 2022 CP D 6009 of 2019 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For order on office objection 2. For hearing of Misc. No. 27942/2022 3. For hearing of main case 10.02.2025 Mr. Adil Channa advocate for the petitioner in CP D 6612 of 2022 Mr. Hanif Faisal Alam, advocate for the petitioner in CP D 6009 of 2019 Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General Per learned counsel, notices have been impugned herein, which shall be responded to by the petitioner before the issuing authority. It is articulated that it may be just and proper for the said notice to be adjudicated vide a speaking order, after providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioner, and pending the aforesaid no further coercive action be taken against the petitioner. Learned AAG articulates no cavil in such regard and states that the petition be disposed of in the said terms. Order accordingly. Office is instructed to place copy of this order in connected matter. Judge Judge Amjad
